dependencyGroups.title: Shared CVF v1.2.2 focused conformance state

scenarios.title: Core compatibility gate
scenarios.objective: verify current batch does not require full regression by frozen-core rules

scenarios.title: Phase Governance Protocol
scenarios.objective: verify development-governance runtime baseline still passes

scenarios.title: Core Git for AI
scenarios.objective: verify layer 0 primitives still pass current test suite

scenarios.title: Agent Platform phase authority
scenarios.objective: verify phase/risk authority layer in web runtime

scenarios.title: Agent response governance
scenarios.objective: verify governance post-check layer in web runtime

scenarios.title: Release manifest consistency
scenarios.objective: verify Phase 5 operational release references remain aligned

scenarios.title: Enterprise evidence pack
scenarios.objective: verify Phase 6 canonical packet remains valid

scenarios.title: Skill Governance Engine
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.2.2 skill governance runtime and approval flow still pass

scenarios.title: Skill misuse refusal paths
scenarios.objective: verify revoked skill and forbidden operation misuse paths are blocked

scenarios.title: Durable rollback and recovery
scenarios.objective: verify rollback and recovery state are recorded across failure and force-rollback paths

scenarios.title: Deterministic replay baseline
scenarios.objective: verify exact replay, drift detection, and fail-closed behavior in v1.9 deterministic reproducibility

scenarios.title: Checkpoint and resume baseline
scenarios.objective: verify proposals can pause after validation and resume from a stored checkpoint

scenarios.title: Deprecated skill runtime gate
scenarios.objective: verify deprecated skills are filtered, blocked at load time, and routed to refusal

scenarios.title: Deprecated skill successor migration
scenarios.objective: verify deprecated skills can migrate to an active successor through runtime registry metadata

scenarios.title: Skill dependency and phase compatibility
scenarios.objective: verify runtime loading fails closed when dependencies are blocked or the current phase is incompatible

scenarios.title: Skill upgrade orchestration
scenarios.objective: verify multi-hop successor migration resolves safely and fails closed on cycles or policy-incompatible targets

scenarios.title: Session-aware checkpoint resume
scenarios.objective: verify long-running session resumes require the correct checkpoint token and session identity

scenarios.title: Session audit linkage
scenarios.objective: verify authorized session resumes persist checkpoint linkage into the execution journal and unauthorized resumes leave no audit record

scenarios.title: Cross-extension audit replay bridge
scenarios.objective: verify a v1.7.1 audit-linked execution record can seed v1.9 replay exactly, detect drift, and fail closed for unauthorized resume linkage

scenarios.title: Cross-extension workflow resume bridge
scenarios.objective: verify a validated v1.7.1 checkpoint can resume into v1.9 replay only with matching session/token and fails closed for non-resumable checkpoint state

scenarios.title: Cross-extension recovery orchestration
scenarios.objective: verify v1.8 rollback records block cross-extension resume, validated checkpoints resume when no rollback is present, and snapshot mismatches fail closed

scenarios.title: Cross-extension failure classification
scenarios.objective: verify runtime interruption, policy refusal, and system abort are classified distinctly and do not attempt workflow resume

scenarios.title: Cross-extension remediation policy
scenarios.objective: verify each orchestration outcome emits a remediation policy with the expected severity, approval requirement, and next-step playbook

scenarios.title: Cross-extension remediation execution
scenarios.objective: verify safe remediation steps execute automatically for resumable/interrupted outcomes and fail closed for human-gated outcomes

scenarios.title: Cross-extension remediation adapter
scenarios.objective: verify remediation adapters receive machine-readable step execution for safe outcomes and remain unused for blocked human-gated outcomes

scenarios.title: Cross-extension remediation file adapter
scenarios.objective: verify safe remediation steps can persist runtime receipts to a local file-backed adapter artifact while blocked outcomes leave no artifact behind

scenarios.title: Cross-extension remediation export path
scenarios.objective: verify the file-backed remediation artifact can be exported into a canonical markdown evidence log and linked into the release-grade artifact path

scenarios.title: Cross-extension release-evidence remediation adapter
scenarios.objective: verify a release-grade remediation adapter can emit both machine-readable and markdown evidence directly at runtime while human-gated outcomes still stay fail-closed

scenarios.title: Runtime Adapter Hub release-evidence adapter
scenarios.objective: verify the release-evidence path now extends into CVF_v1.7.3_RUNTIME_ADAPTER_HUB so another runtime family can emit compatible remediation evidence artifacts

scenarios.title: Multi-runtime remediation evidence manifest
scenarios.objective: verify remediation evidence from the current runtime families can be assembled into a canonical manifest and validated through the release packet / enterprise evidence chain

scenarios.title: Runtime evidence manifest release metadata
scenarios.objective: verify the multi-runtime remediation evidence manifest stays aligned with CVF_RELEASE_MANIFEST.md and the linked release packet

scenarios.title: Safety Hardening evidence family
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.8 safety hardening rollback/recovery line is present as a third runtime family in the multi-runtime evidence manifest

scenarios.title: Runtime evidence release policy coverage
scenarios.objective: verify the linked release packet posture remains semantically compatible with the releaseLine and maturity mix of the current runtime evidence families

scenarios.title: Safety Runtime evidence family
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.7.1 safety runtime checkpoint/session line is present as a fourth runtime family in the multi-runtime evidence manifest

scenarios.title: Production-candidate packet policy coverage
scenarios.objective: verify the runtime evidence chain also supports a canonical production-candidate review packet, not only the local-ready packet posture

scenarios.title: Internal audit packet policy coverage
scenarios.objective: verify the runtime evidence chain also supports a canonical internal-audit packet posture with audit-only semantics and non-approval decision state

scenarios.title: Enterprise onboarding packet policy coverage
scenarios.objective: verify the runtime evidence chain also supports a canonical enterprise-onboarding packet posture with onboarding-only semantics and non-approval decision state

scenarios.title: Agent Platform evidence family
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.6 agent platform governance snapshot/enforcement line is present as a fifth runtime family in the multi-runtime evidence manifest

scenarios.title: Governance Engine evidence family
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.6.1 governance engine policy/enforcement/approval line is present as a sixth runtime family in the multi-runtime evidence manifest

scenarios.title: Skill Governance evidence family
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.2.2 skill governance filtering/phase-gating/migration line is present as a seventh runtime family in the multi-runtime evidence manifest

scenarios.title: Phase Governance evidence family
scenarios.objective: verify the v1.1.1 phase governance integrity/pipeline/audit line is present as an eighth runtime family in the multi-runtime evidence manifest

scenarios.title: Cross-family packet coverage
scenarios.objective: verify the canonical release packet explicitly reflects runtime-family count, release-line coverage, maturity-band coverage, and deferred-family policy for the current multi-runtime manifest

scenarios.title: Secondary packet cross-family coverage
scenarios.objective: verify the production-candidate, internal-audit, and enterprise-onboarding packet postures also carry explicit cross-family runtime coverage aligned with the current multi-runtime manifest

scenarios.title: Cross-family deferred policy stratification
scenarios.objective: verify local and secondary packet postures all expose consistent deferred-family counts, release-line defer lists, maturity-based defer lists, promotion-eligible families, and packet-specific mixed-maturity posture

scenarios.title: Cross-family promotion readiness policy
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture classifies runtime families consistently as reviewable, auditable, onboarding-visible, or strictly deferred from the same multi-runtime manifest

scenarios.title: Cross-family promotion exception policy
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly that promotion remains blocked by default and identifies which families require a separate exception or approval path before promotion

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval decision policy
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which families are approval-eligible versus approval-blocked, rather than inferring that decision from promotion or visibility semantics

scenarios.title: Cross-family transition policy
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which families can enter a future promotion transition path and which remain transition-blocked pending stronger approval conditions

scenarios.title: Cross-family transition prerequisites
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which families remain transition-prerequisite candidates and which concrete evidence threshold must be met before they can become promotable

scenarios.title: Cross-family transition threshold satisfaction
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether transition-prerequisite families are currently threshold-satisfied or still pending, instead of implying fulfillment from prerequisite declaration alone

scenarios.title: Cross-family transition fulfillment evidence
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether transition fulfillment evidence is actually attached, instead of implying fulfillment from threshold satisfaction semantics alone

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact binding
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which approval artifact, if any, is bound as the decision basis for transition fulfillment

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact fulfillment
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether the bound approval artifact is already fulfillment-sufficient or still pending a stronger approval-strength decision

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact strength
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which approval strength is required for transition use and which strength is currently observed in the bound artifact or packet posture

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact authority
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which authority issued the current approval artifact or posture and whether that authority is review-only, approval-authorized, audit-only, or onboarding-only

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact validity lifecycle
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether the current approval artifact is active, expired, invalidated, or still unbound for transition use

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact invalidation evidence
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation evidence, expiry evidence, and invalidation-source binding are present, absent, or still unbound for the current approval artifact

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external validity
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether expiry timestamp checks, freshness state, and external invalidation authority are bound, absent, or still unbound for the current approval artifact

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external authority trust
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether externally scoped approval authority trust remains unbound, is satisfied by a self-issued governing authority, or is not applicable for the current packet posture

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external issuer policy
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether external issuer attestation is unbound or self-attested and whether third-party issuer trust remains disabled or not applicable for the current packet posture

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external issuer verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether external issuer attestation has actually been verified at the current governing boundary and whether third-party issuer trust enforcement remains disabled or not applicable for the current packet posture

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external proof binding
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether issuer-attestation proof is bound to the current packet and whether external revocation authority has actually been verified at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external proof verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether issuer-attestation proof has actually been verified and which proof-issuer scope is allowed at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external proof attestation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which attestation evidence backs the current issuer proof and whether third-party proof trust remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation validation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether external revocation authority validation is complete and whether third-party revocation trust remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation attestation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which external revocation proof evidence is in force and whether third-party revocation attestation remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer authority
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which revocation issuer authority is bound and whether revocation attestation verification is complete or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer attestation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which revocation issuer attestation proof is bound and whether third-party revocation issuer trust remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof has actually been verified and whether third-party revocation issuer trust enforcement remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof attestation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which revocation issuer proof attestation evidence is bound and whether third-party revocation issuer trust validation remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof validity
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof attestation evidence is still fresh and whether third-party revocation issuer attestation remains denied or not applicable at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof external validity
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which expiry timestamp and invalidation source govern revocation issuer proof semantics at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority validation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof timestamps have actually been verified and whether the invalidation authority itself has been validated at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which authority provenance chain and invalidation-authority provenance chain govern revocation issuer proof semantics at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority attestation
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which authority attestation evidence and invalidation-authority attestation evidence govern revocation issuer proof semantics at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority attestation verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority attestation and invalidation-authority attestation have actually been verified at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority provenance and invalidation-authority provenance have actually been verified at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation and invalidation-authority provenance attestation have actually been verified at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation freshness
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation and invalidation-authority provenance attestation remain fresh at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which provenance chain governs revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation and invalidation-authority provenance attestation at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance and invalidation-authority provenance attestation provenance have actually been verified at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance freshness
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance and invalidation-authority provenance attestation provenance remain fresh at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance freshness proof
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly which freshness-proof evidence governs revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance and invalidation-authority provenance attestation provenance at the current governing boundary

scenarios.title: Cross-family approval artifact external revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance freshness proof verification
scenarios.objective: verify every supported packet posture states explicitly whether revocation issuer proof authority provenance attestation provenance freshness proof and invalidation-authority provenance attestation provenance freshness proof have actually been verified at the current governing boundary
